ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or startup */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the project was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the project or startup */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "valuation" REAL /* Current valuation of the project in USD */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment round */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the investment round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment round (e.g., Series B) */,
  "announced_on" TEXT /* Date the investment round was announced */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the investment round */,
  "valuation_pre_money" REAL /* Pre-money valuation of the project at the time of the investment round */,
  "valuation_post_money" REAL /* Post-money valuation of the project after the investment round */,
  "term_sheet_link" TEXT /* Link to the term sheet of the investment round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_rounds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the lead investor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the lead investor */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the lead investor's profile or website */,
  "firm_type" TEXT /* Type of investment firm */,
  "investment_focus" TEXT /* Focus areas of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_investors" (
  "round_investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round-investor relationship */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment round */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_investors_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_investors_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES lead_investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment round associated with the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was made */,
  "announcement_link" TEXT /* Link to the announcement or press release */,
  "announcement_source" TEXT /* Source of the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment round */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  "investment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Calculated return on investment if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment round associated with the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_notes_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES investment_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
